notableEvents.label: Christian Walker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Christian Walker grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Alex Freeland to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Christian Walker out at 1st.
